CAREERS
SPOT COFFEE IS CURRENTLY HIRING FOR THE FOLLOWING POSITIONS:

Williamsville, Assistant Café Manager

Delaware, Café Kitchen Manager

Looking for fun and meaningful employment in food service?  We’d love to hear from you. Whether new to the food industry or a food service veteran, working at SPoT is more than a career – it’s an experience. As part of the SPoT team, you will serve your unique community in a fast-paced, exciting environment. Fill your cup with industry-leading wages and benefits.
